use_cases: Primary and secondary action triggers in web application interfaces
Form submission and interactive call-to-action buttons
Navigation controls with multiple visual states (default, hover, active, disabled)
Flexible button component supporting multiple variants for different UI contexts
ai_summary: A reusable button component with multiple style variants including default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, and link options, along with size configurations. Built with class-variance-authority for consistent styling and Radix UI Slot for composition flexibility. Features accessibility-focused design with focus-visible states and keyboard navigation support.
